who: HR administrators in medical clinics managing 5-15 staff training renewals/month
offer: For HR administrators in medical clinics processing 5-15 training renewals/month, manual tracking causes missed deadlines. We automate scheduling and confirmations instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or email.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and confirming training renewals for staff
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR administrators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR administrators with demo video
Community forums for HR administrators sharing tools
try_it: Let users try scheduling and confirmation tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
